case_title: SUSAN GREEN RESPONDENT VS. CYNTHIA CHIEM et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2006 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2006 BY PATRICK J. MAHONEY. JUDGE MAHONEY, G. PEERLESS, CLK.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2006 - JUDGMENT RENDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT SUSAN GREEN AND AGAINST APPELLANT CYNTHIA CHIEM IN THE AMOUNT OF $269.88. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. JUDGE MAHONEY, G. PEERLESS, CLK.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2006 - CONTINUED TO NOV-15-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 502 APPELLANT DID NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM JUDGE. JUDGE MAHONEY, G. PEERLESS, CLK.

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT CHIEM, CYNTHIA BUSTAMI, KARIM AS TO RESPONDENT GREEN, SUSAN HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 818316

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GREEN, SUSAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CHIEM, CYNTHIA $269.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $269.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS

RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT FINDS THE APPELLANT CHIEM'S DAMAGES ARE $1057.23 AND THAT RESPONDANT GREEN'S DAMAGES ARE $1596.88. COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT EACH PARTY IS 50% AT FAULT. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF SUSAN GREEN AND AGAINST CYNTHIA CHIEM IN THE AMOUNT OF $269.88. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED, DONE SO 10/02/06 & 11/08/06.
